overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a hooded character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a rural riverside environment at night. The character traverses a dirt path, wades through a shallow river, and continues toward a distant village with palm trees and stone architecture visible under moonlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a river with palm trees lining the route

entered.detail: tall palm tree trunk visible on the left side of the path
unpaved dirt trail with visible wheel ruts and patches of grass
rustic wooden fence structure near the riverbank
calm river water reflecting the night sky in the distance
stone buildings with traditional architecture visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through rural countryside at night, with palm trees and vegetation visible. The path leads toward a river with ancient stone buildings visible in the distance across the water.

events.description: character steps from dirt path into shallow river water
aquatic animals visible swimming in the water ahead

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep river water toward the opposite bank

notable_agents.action: large aquatic animal swimming in the river, partially submerged

entered.detail: shallow river water surrounding the character up to waist level
rocks visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and wades through the water, with aquatic animals visible swimming nearby. The surrounding landscape features distant palm trees on the banks and ancient structures visible across the river.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with irrigation channels approaching village

events.description: character exits the river onto the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path on the far side of the river toward the village

entered.detail: dry dirt trail continuing on the far bank with visible tracks
low stone wall running along the right side of the path
narrow water channel running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character walks along a dirt path bordered by stone walls and irrigation channels, approaching the ancient village with palm trees silhouetted against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit rural landscape that transitions from a dusty trail into a river crossing and finally toward an ancient village. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through the countryside, flanked by palm trees and vegetation while stone buildings loom in the distance. As the path ends, the camera follows the character as they enter and wade through the river, passing aquatic animals swimming in the shallow water. The scene then shifts as the character emerges from the river onto a new dirt path bordered by stone walls and irrigation channels. Finally, the camera advances toward the ancient village, where palm trees are silhouetted against the dark night sky.
